items.caption: A comic strip page featuring Donald Duck, his nephews, and Black Pete on a ship. In the first panel, Black Pete points and shouts "GRAB 'EM, LADS, QUICK!" while Donald exclaims "BLACK PETE!". The subsequent panels show a chaotic chase and struggle on the ship's deck and rigging.
items.md: ![A comic strip page featuring Donald Duck, his nephews, and Black Pete on a ship. In the first panel, Black Pete points and shouts "GRAB 'EM, LADS, QUICK!" while Donald exclaims "BLACK PETE!". The subsequent panels show a chaotic chase and struggle on the ship's deck and rigging.](CBatAotCB-105_page_1_image_1_v2.jpg)
From Donald Duck Four Color No. 9, 1942; © 1942 Walt Disney Productions.
